meta.title: Fourth of July — New Hampshire
meta.description: Fourth of July week at Mom & Dad's in Melvin Village. Kristina and family will be there too.

bookings.label: American Airlines · STL → BOS
bookings.detail: Jul 1 · AA 3814 (Envoy Air) · STL 9:39 AM → BOS 1:24 PM. Ticketed through BUF — deplane at BOS, do not board BOS→BUF leg. No checked bags.
bookings.notes: Skiplagged fare: booked STL→BUF via BOS. Deplane at BOS. Carry-on only — no checked bags or they go to BUF.

bookings.label: Southwest · BOS → STL
bookings.detail: Jul 7 · WN 754 · BOS 6:25 PM → STL 8:30 PM. Seats 12A/B/C/D (Preferred). Basic fare.
bookings.notes: Meghan 12A, Michael 12B, Louise 12C, Kenna 12D. Basic fare — carryon + personal item only.

bookings.label: Enterprise · Midsize (Corolla) at BOS
bookings.detail: Jul 1 1:00 PM → Jul 7 6:00 PM. Midsize Car (Toyota Corolla or Similar). 15 Transportation Way, East Boston.
bookings.notes: Booked via Capital One Travel. Platinum status with Enterprise. Free cancellation before pick-up.

timeline.title: Depart STL → BOS
timeline.detail: AA 3814 · STL 9:39 AM → BOS 1:24 PM. Deplane at BOS (skiplagged).

timeline.title: Pick up rental car
timeline.detail: Enterprise · 15 Transportation Way, East Boston. Midsize Corolla.

timeline.title: Drive BOS → Melvin Village
timeline.detail: ~2 hr drive north to parents' house.

timeline.title: Fourth of July
timeline.detail: Celebrate at the lake with family!

timeline.title: Drive Melvin Village → BOS
timeline.detail: ~2 hr drive south to Logan Airport.

timeline.title: Return rental car
timeline.detail: Enterprise · 15 Transportation Way, East Boston. Due back by 6:00 PM.

timeline.title: Depart BOS → STL
timeline.detail: WN 754 · BOS 6:25 PM → STL 8:30 PM. Seats 12A/B/C/D.

checklist.text: Book flights — AA outbound (DBDQRA), WN return (AXYZFP)
Book rental car — Enterprise at BOS (H-1596322716COUNT)
Pack swimsuits & lake gear for Louise
CARRY-ON ONLY — no checked bags (skiplagged outbound)
